characteristics.drainage: Good in sandy, poor in clayey alluvial

management_recommendations: Regular green manuring (Dhaincha/Sesbania) to improve organic carbon
Balanced NPK application based on soil test values
Add zinc sulphate (25 kg/ha) for rice-wheat systems
Gypsum application for sodic patches (5-10 tonnes/ha)
Micro-irrigation for efficient water use on sandy alluvium

regions: Deccan Plateau (Maharashtra, MP, Gujarat, Karnataka, AP, Telangana)

characteristics.texture: Clay to heavy clay (>40% clay, high montmorillonite)
characteristics.water_retention: Very High (swells when wet, cracks when dry)
characteristics.drainage: Poor — waterlogging in monsoon, deep cracks in summer

management_recommendations: Broad bed and furrow (BBF) system to prevent waterlogging
Apply FYM/compost (5-8 tonnes/acre) to improve structure
Green manuring with Dhaincha before Kharif sowing
Gypsum (2 tonnes/ha) if exchangeable sodium >15%
Avoid excessive tillage when wet — causes puddling
Install drainage channels for monsoon waterlogging
Lime application (2-4 tonnes/ha) to raise pH above 6.0
Apply phosphorus as single super phosphate (SSP) — cheaper and provides sulphur
Organic matter addition critical — use vermicompost 2 tonnes/acre
Boron application (0.5 kg Borax/acre) for groundnut and pulses
Contour farming and check dams for soil/water conservation
Mulching to reduce erosion and conserve moisture
Heavy liming (3-5 tonnes/ha) to neutralize acidity
Rock phosphate application (cheaper, slow-release P source)
Organic matter addition essential — coconut coir pith, coffee husk compost
Green manuring with Crotalaria/Gliricidia
Terracing for soil conservation on slopes
Band placement of fertilizers to reduce fixation losses

nutrient_status.micronutrients: Zinc, iron, manganese all deficient at high pH

management_recommendations: Gypsum application (5-10 tonnes/ha based on gypsum requirement)
Install subsurface drainage to lower water table
Use salt-tolerant crop varieties (CSR series rice, KRL 210 wheat)
Leaching irrigation with good quality water
Green manuring with Sesbania to improve permeability
Organic amendments (FYM, pressmud) to improve soil structure
Avoid use of sodium-rich irrigation water (RSC > 2.5 meq/L)
